user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
**Ticket:** "I AM SO TIRED OF THIS SERVICE! NOTHING WORKS AND I AM GOING TO LEAVE A ONE-STAR REVIEW EVERYWHERE IF THIS ISN'T FIXED IMMEDIATELY!"

**Compass:**
Priority: HIGH
Category: Technical - Escalation/Retention Risk

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

I can hear how frustrated you are, and I am truly sorry that our service hasn't met your expectations. I completely understand why you’re upset—you rely on us to get your work done, and it’s clear we’ve let you down.

I want to make this right for you immediately. To help me get this resolved as quickly as possible, could you please provide a few more details?

1. What specific error message or behavior are you seeing right now?
2. Are you working on a desktop or mobile device?

I have flagged this ticket as a priority so that our technical team can investigate it right away. Once I have those details, I will personally monitor the progress until we have a solution for you.

Thank you for your patience while we get this sorted out.

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its system instructions perfectly by categorizing the ticket and drafting a calm, empathetic response as requested by the user.
